feature: Add Product to Cart and Checkout
story: As a product owner I would like the user to be able to select one product, add it to the cart and checkout

cases.title: Add LED Lamp to Cart and Verify
steps: Open the NOVA Store homepage
Locate the Smart LED Desk Lamp product card
Click the Add button on the Smart LED Desk Lamp product card
Verify the cart badge displays 1
Open the cart drawer
Verify the Smart LED Desk Lamp is listed in the cart
Verify the quantity of the Smart LED Desk Lamp is 1
Verify the price of the Smart LED Desk Lamp is $79.99
assertions: Cart should list Smart LED Desk Lamp

cases.title: Checkout with Store Pickup
steps: Open the cart drawer
Click the Proceed to Checkout button
Verify the checkout page is displayed
Click the Choose Delivery button
Verify the delivery options are displayed
Select the Store Pickup option
Verify the Store Pickup option is highlighted
Select the Nova Palo Alto store location
Verify the schedule section is visible
Select the pickup date as Friday
Verify the time section is visible
Select the pickup time as 10:00 AM
Click the Continue to Payment button
Verify the payment step is displayed
Enter the valid card number
Enter the cardholder's name
Enter the card expiry date
Enter the card CVV
Click the Review Order button
Verify the review step is displayed
Click the Place Order button
Verify the confirmation page is displayed
Verify the Order Confirmed! message is displayed
Verify the Continue Shopping button is visible
assertions: Store Pickup option should be highlighted
Order Confirmed! message should be displayed
Continue Shopping button should be visible
